questions.question: What is the phase boundary?
questions.answer: Ship the power-mode file-UI layer in JSON-only form (D-05..D-08).

questions.question: Main implementation decision?
questions.answer: No HTML companion; QUESTIONS.json is authoritative until finalize.

questions.question: Which prior references must hold?
questions.answer: Phase 2 core.cjs (atomicWriteFileSync, withFileLock), Phase 3 template.cjs render.

questions.question: User-specific expectations?
questions.answer: Edit QUESTIONS.json in any editor (VS Code, vim, JetBrains).

questions.question: What is out of scope?
questions.answer: HTML companion UI is deferred indefinitely.
